• ✱ ✱
    • what is this? Hi are.na team! There’s nothing here yet, but this is a WIP idea that I’m working on getting running in time for the meetup next week :^). Please prioritize other people who have projects ready — I just wanted it to put this in my RSVP so you know I’m potentially interested in sharing something. And no hard feelings if you can’t include me. Thank you / looking forward to it!!
